name: Review design package and pilot gate
release_check: Pilot bars identified and stock verified

name: Receive and verify aluminum stock
release_check: Thickness 0.250 +/- 0.005 in, width 1.000 +/- 0.010 in, mill lot recorded

name: Mark bar length and node positions
tool: Stop-block sled, square, fine marker, centerline gauge
release_check: Length and node positions within +/- 0.020 in

name: Cut bars to length
release_check: Cut squareness <= 0.5 deg; both ends deburred

name: Drill node holes
tool: 3/16 in HSS or carbide bit, hardwood backer, depth stop
primary_outputs: Bars with two clean node holes
release_check: Hole dia 0.1875 +/- 0.005 in; perpendicular within 1 deg

name: Strike-test on foam supports
primary_outputs: Measured Hz / sustain / timbre per pilot
release_check: K_eff = f * L^2 / t computed for each pilot

name: Trim to pitch
tool: Belt sander or bench file, calipers, tuner
release_check: Pilots within +/- 10 cents; production within +/- 5 cents

name: Walnut frame: receive and inspect
release_check: Straight grain in finished area; thickness 0.75 in

name: Walnut frame: CNC fixture and datum verification
tool: Spoilboard surfacing bit, edge finder/probe, clamps/tape

name: Walnut frame: rough rail profile and grommet pockets
primary_outputs: Profiled walnut rails with grommet pockets
release_check: Pocket dia/depth correct; bar-to-bar spacing 1.25 in

name: Walnut frame: optional inlay engraving
tool: 1/8 in V-bit (60 deg) or diode laser

name: Walnut frame: drill stainless rod and fastener holes
Mounting prototype rig (durometer pilot)
tool: Three walnut blocks, three durometer grommets, paracord, rod
primary_outputs: Sustain and pitch-shift data per durometer
release_check: Sustain >= 75% of flat-bar; pitch shift <= 5 cents; no buzz

name: Frame assembly and bar mounting
release_check: All bars seated; no metal-on-metal contact

name: Final validation and release
release_check: Within +/- 5 cents at soft dynamic; no buzz at any dynamic
